title: Hackers breach GTA 6 developer Rockstar Games, demand ransom payment by tomorrow
summary: Rockstar Games confirmed a data breach linked to a third-party provider. The ransomware group ShinyHunter has demanded a ransom by April 14 and have threatened to leak stolen data otherwise.&nbsp;

title: What is Project Houdini? How Amazon plans to build data centres faster by cutting thousands of labour hours
summary: Amazon is developing Project Houdini to speed up data centre construction for AI, according to a new report. The initiative is said to shift much of the process off-site, reducing construction time from 15 weeks to as little as two to three weeks and cutting labour hours significantly.

title: As AI use increases at work, many employees still choose not to use it: Gallup poll
summary: Most workers using AI report productivity boosts. Roughly 3 in 10 employees are frequent users of AI in their jobs, meaning they use it daily or a few times a week. About 2 in 10 are infrequent users, using AI tools at work a few times a month or a few times a year.
